rationale: Both papers are theoretical spokes-model analyses with the same core primitives (consumer taste diversity, valuation regimes, and incomplete availability/coverage via N vs. n), and the citing paper’s design appears closely aligned with this framework. Given this strong model/mechanism overlap—even though the raw evidence only confirms a DOI match and not in-text context—the cited work is plausibly a substantive theory/method source rather than an incidental mention.
